name: generatedart-platform
description: GeneratedArt — community-run generative art platform and NFT marketplace. Monorepo: Jekyll site, Astro app, Cloudflare Workers, Foundry contracts.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n site,app,api,renderer -c green,blue,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:site" "pnpm dev:app" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:renderer"
scripts.dev:site: cd site && bundle exec jekyll serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000 --no-watch
scripts.build:site: cd site && bundle exec jekyll build
